objstore.description:
Object store configuration shared by all components that read or write
blocks (Receive, Store Gateway, Compactor, Ruler).
Object store configuration block shared by all Thanos components.

config.default:
type: GCS
config:
  bucket: change-me
  endpoint: storage.googleapis.com
  region: eu-west-1
  insecure: false

# Example for S3
# type: S3
# config:
#   bucket: my-s3-bucket
#   endpoint: s3.eu-west-1.amazonaws.com
#   region: eu-west-1
#   access_key: myaccess
#   secret_key: mysecret
config.description:
Inline object store configuration rendered into the Secret when
`createSecret` is true. Processed via `tpl`, so Helm template syntax
(e.g. `{{ .Release.Name }}`) is valid inside the string.
Refer to https://thanos.io/tip/thanos/storage.md/ for the full schema.

rules.description:
Inline rule files loaded by the Ruler. Keys are filenames; values are
PrometheusRule-compatible YAML content. Use external ConfigMap volumes
for large or frequently updated rule sets.

example-alerts.yaml.default:
groups:
  - name: thanos-example
    rules:
      - alert: ExampleAlwaysFiring
        expr: vector(1)
        for: 1m
        labels:
          severity: warning
        annotations:
          summary: Example alert firing

rustfs.description:
======================================================================
RustFS subchart (optional local S3-compatible object store)
Disabled by default. Enable in CI or development environments where no
external object store is available. See charts/thanos/ci/ci-values.yaml
for a complete CI configuration example.
======================================================================
RustFS subchart — optional local S3-compatible object store for CI/dev environments.

enabled.description:
Deploy a local RustFS instance as an S3-compatible object store alongside Thanos.
Intended for CI and development only. Do not enable in production.
enabled.title: enabled

accessKey.description: RustFS admin username. Ignored when existingSecret is set.
accessKey.title: accessKey

existingSecret.description:
Name of an existing Secret containing the RustFS credentials.
When set, accessKey and secretKey are ignored.
The Secret must contain the keys defined in existingSecretKeys.
existingSecret.title: existingSecret

secretKey.title: secretKey

image.description: Image used by the init-bucket Job to create the S3 bucket via the RustFS CLI.
image.title: image

secretKey.description: RustFS admin password. Ignored when existingSecret is set.
secretKey.title: secretKey

rustfs.title: rustfs

storegateway.description:
======================================================================
Store Gateway component
Exposes historical blocks from the object store via the Store API.
Query routes requests for data older than the local Receive retention
to this component.
======================================================================
Store Gateway component — serves historical blocks from the object store over the Store API.
